title: Asheri Fort
tagline: Asheri Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Asheri Fort / Asheri is a fort located 102 km from Mumbai and 88 km from Thane.
overview.description: Asheri Fort / Asheri is a fort located 102 km from Mumbai and 88 km from Thane. It is in Palghar district, of Maharashtra. This fort is an important fort in Palghar district. The fort is located on the hills near Mendhavan Khind on Mumbai-Ahmedabad highway.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Asheri Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Asheri Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Asheri Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (81 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (68 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Asheri Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Asheri Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Asheri Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Asheri Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Asheri Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vilshet, Ghaneghar, Peth, Dahanu, Tawa, Dahanu, Kolhan (village).
